CREATE TABLE test_data (baseline FLOAT, sigma FLOAT, mde FLOAT, power FLOAT, alpha FLOAT);
SELECT minSampleSizeContinous(baseline, sigma, mde, power, alpha) AS sample_size FROM test_data;
SELECT baseline, minSampleSizeContinous(baseline, 15.0, 0.05, 0.90, 0.01) AS sample_size FROM baseline_data;
SELECT minSampleSizeContinous(baseline, sigma, 0.03, 0.80, 0.05) AS sample_size FROM (SELECT baseline, 21.1 AS sigma FROM baseline_data);

SELECT MIN(sample_size) AS min_size FROM (SELECT minSampleSizeContinous(baseline, sigma, mde, power, alpha) AS sample_size FROM test_data JOIN baseline_data ON test_data.baseline = baseline_data.baseline);
CREATE TABLE metrics (baseline FLOAT, sigma FLOAT, mde FLOAT, power FLOAT, alpha FLOAT, metric_value FLOAT);
SELECT m.metric_value, minSampleSizeContinous(m.baseline, m.sigma, m.mde, m.power, m.alpha) AS sample_size FROM metrics m WHERE m.metric_value > 1.6;
